title: Which character from NGE do you wish was real
display_title: Which character from NGE do you wish was real
wikitext:
[]: Which character from NGE do you wish was real?             Quote Post by bap_120790 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 3:17 pm Which character from NGE would you wish were real, in terms of both looks and personality, but doesn't have to do anything with saving the world? This is a weird question, so I put it here, replies are appreciated. : )

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 17, 2007 3:20 pm hm....Misato if i was 15 years older or she was 15 years younger!

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Nov 17, 2007 4:56 pm No one, really. I don't deserve it, though if I had to choose, either Shinji or Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sat Nov 17, 2007 4:59 pm Asuka, because I'd sooo tap that...

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 5:46 pm The girls in the anime aren't my type. Although, if it was a question of sex, I'd go with Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 17, 2007 5:56 pm I'm not sure I'd wish the pain of reality on any of them... And I'm not really in a position to foster Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:00 pm Misato good drinking buddy (with benefits :twisted: )

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:16 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I'm not sure I'd wish the pain of reality on any of them... And I'm not really in a position to foster Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:29 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: hm....Misato if i was 15 years older or she was 15 years younger!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:32 pm slothen wrote: liar! you'd totally want akagi to be real so you could take her out for drinks.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:34 pm For me, it would be Mana. She's awesome, and, apparently, I'm the only one that likes her.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:39 pm TriLink12 wrote: Asuka, because I'd sooo tap that...

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:40 pm Oh, I almost forgot. Fem-Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 17, 2007 6:45 pm o! and a 1 foot tall Leliel. it can be like my limitless containter full of everything i dont want my mom to see

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Nov 17, 2007 7:44 pm Kaworu, because my family would approve of her taste in music.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 9:16 pm they big fans of Ludwig?

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Sat Nov 17, 2007 9:59 pm BobBQ wrote: Kaworu, because my family would approve of her taste in music.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:10 pm GNR scare all my friends....or The whole state of Colorado:What the... BOOBies!!

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:30 pm ....I'd go with female Keel, I love cyborgs...but I wouldn't want to be an old male one, after that I'd go with Rei

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Nov 17, 2007 11:49 pm o! i want my own Rei hehe my very own doll to do anything i order her to do! of course, Misato would have a lot more emotion i think i'll stick with Misato

This is a weird question, so I put it here, replies are appreciated. : )
